feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Orchestration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Orchestration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: No PO approval loop for date changes
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm looking to negate the approval loop just for date changes (e.g. delivery confirmation). Can I turn of the trigger for the PO approval loop for certain columns in the PO?

Any and all suggestions are welcome.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Groovy or XSLT to remove XML Tag(not values) in sap cpi payload
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a XML payload from which I need to remove only the XML tag and the values should pass to the parent tag. Sample payload mentioned below -

I tried few groovy functions mentioned on the community but that is replacing the entire <AdditionalComments/> tag to blank which is not expected.

Please help me if we can take this with groovy or I need to go with XSLT?

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: SAP PO version upgrade and security patch activity
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currenty working on SAP PO 7.5 single stack SP28.. and we would like to upgrade to latest version available.. could you please let us know how do we find out the latest version of SAP PO.. also collecting the right versions for all components.. Also how do we check and conclude whether any security patch is needed for SAP PO environments? Could you please advise on this, Thank you!

Regards

Ramu.

entry.title: AIF monitoring in SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently using SAP PO/PI 7.5 as Integration platform with in our landscape..

To do AIF(application interface framework) monitoring, to see the end to end message flow from/to S4/ECC regarding outbound/inbound interfaces we have customized Fiori page...

we are using the Fiori page for the following cases..

(i) AIF Messages (ii) AIF Monitoring (iii) Interface monitoring...

In that Fiori page, it shows status of the messages on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. also if someone clicks on SAP PO status "hyperlink" of that specific message then it re-directs to the SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message... it is possible to link SAP backend and SAP PO messsage on Fiori page because message ID for outbound messages is same on SAP backend & SAP PO/PI.. it is easier to fetch SAP PO status of the specific message...

Fiori page with SAP PO Message status Hyperlink (here "Success" is hyperlink)..

SAP PO monitoring page of that specific message

We are planning to migrate all the interfaces from SAP PO/PI to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration)..

Now, what are different alternate options available within SAP BTP to cater this requirement..

1. BTP Based Fiori app 

2. SAP Cloud ALM for end to end monitoring..

AFAIK, the option 1) above is expensive since Fiori developers has to put of lot of efforts to build such app for AIF monitoring.. Could option 2) completely replace the above solution implemented in SAP PO/PI?? Could you please let me know which is better option in terms various factors like Cost, efforts, time to develope/implement, SAP recommendation, standard solution etc.., Thank you!

//Ramu

entry.title: SAP PO Error : Error while getting token and sign] in class com.sap.xi.tf
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In SAP PIPO we are getting Error while getting token and sign] in class com.sap.xi.tf._MM_Request_FEDummy_ method LookupTokenSign[wsfe, TrustedCAs, sap, 30710174586, SID_400, CC_RFC_RCV_GRC_ARG_DOM_Lookup, BC_WSAA, CC_SOAP_RCV_WSAA_ARG_DOM, com.sap.aii.mappingtool.tf7.rt.Context@25c63a24].

Due to this error we are unable to establish connection between SAP PO and Argentina govt invoices.

entry.title: Convert Binary file(not readable) to Base 64 format in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement where I am fetching a file(can be of .pdf/.xls/.word/.txt any format) from Azure DevOps portal and want to send that attachment file in base 64 format to Service Now.

The file fetched from Azure is coming in CPI in binary format(other than .txt file) and it is not readable format. The target system is only excepting base 64 encoded file.

Please guide me how can I convert the binary file getting downloaded in readable format?

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: SFTP Error: promptPassword(String message) is not implemented yet!" after SP28 installed
entry.content:
Hi,

We had recently updgraded SAP PO system to SP28. For one of the SFTP receiver channel, I am receving the following error:

"Message could not be forwarded to the JCA adapter. Reason: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: promptPassword(String message) is not implemented yet!" 

I had already verified the SAP Note: 3406752 and applied the following Additional parameter in the SFTP Receiver Channel -> Advanced mode

customPreferredAuthentication  = "password"

But still the error remains same.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Vijay

entry.title: How to host SAP PI/PO as a web service ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am working on a scenario involving integration between an SAP system and a third-party system, where SAP PI/PO is used as the middleware. My objective is to provide the third-party sender with an API of SAP PI/PO, which they will use to send data. The data received by PI/PO will be passed on to an OData service developed by an ABAPer.

Requirements:

  • The third-party sender will call the PI/PO API to send data.
  • PI/PO will need to send this data to the OData service.
  • The OData service requires a CSRF token in the request headers when receiving data.

Since I am new to SAP PI/PO, I would appreciate some guidance on the following:

  1. API Creation in PI/PO:

    • How can I create and expose the API in SAP PI/PO for the third-party system to send data?
    • What are the steps to configure the communication channel and integration flow?

  2. Routing Data to OData Service:

    • What is the best way to route the data from PI/PO to the OData service on the SAP backend?
    • Are there any specific configurations for the receiver communication channel to handle OData service calls?

  3. CSRF Token Handling:

    • The OData service requires a CSRF token to be included in the request headers.
    • How can I fetch the CSRF token from the OData service dynamically within PI/PO?
    • What is the recommended way to assign this token to the HTTP headers in PI/PO before sending the data to the OData service?

If anyone has experience with this type of integration, please share any best practices, detailed steps, or resources that can help me successfully implement this.


Best Regards, 

Prathmesh Sutar 
prathmeshsutar.sapcpi@gmail.com

entry.title: Structure Formatting for Receiver in SAP CPI through Groovy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

So, there was a requirement where the XML Structure was coming with <div></div> in one of the fields and we need to remove that, it cannot be handled by XSLT as @ symbol was expected in email id so with the help of the groovy mentioned in the blog below it was resolved.

Source Structure -

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>
<Root>
<Root1>
<ADONumber>12345</ADONumber>
<State></State>
<AssignedTo>SRIVASTAVA Nidhi (External) <nidhi.srivastava.ext@XXXXX.eu> </AssignedTo>
<Priority></Priority>
<AdditionalComments>
<div>Comment 5</div>
</AdditionalComments>
</Root1>
</Root>

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/groovy-or-xslt-to-remove-xml-tag-not-values-in-sap-cpi-payload/qaq-p/13873348

1) Now, the issue is when there is a copy paste in the system sending the data instead of <div> <span> is coming.  Something like mentioned below, this is resolved by using XSLT before the groovy mentioned in the blog solution and it is working fine - but email id issue persisting.

<AdditionalComments><span style="color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);font-size:15px;display:inline !important;">Testing Updates after removing SPAN to DIV</span></AdditionalComments>

2) Also, when there is a mix of manual writing and copy paste in the system the field is coming like 

<AdditionalComments><div>ABC  <span style="color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);font-size:15px;display:inline !important;">Testing Updates after removing SPAN to DIV XYZ <span style="display:inline !important;">Testing Updates after removing SPAN to DIV</span></span></div></AdditionalComments>

For manual written words <div> tag is coming and for copy pasted words <span> tag is coming.

Not sure if I am able to explain my issue properly, require your expert advice.

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Azure Databricks Connection using SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Does anyone have experience on integrating Azure Databricks with S4 using SAP PO/PI?

We have requirement to pull the delta data from Azure databricks Database to SAP S4 system. We also have SAP PO 7.5 single stack in our landscape for this purpose.. SAP S4 system is expecting the data to be transformed in to an IDOC structure.. So, the question is what would be state of art technology to implement this interface? Should we ask Azure Databricks to execute Query statement to fetch the data from various tables and store it on Azure Databricks temporary storage somewhere and if it is possible to store the data on Azure databricks on some temporary storage? if yes, what should be that temporary storage option available on Azure Databricks side? 

1. SAP PO fetches the data from Azure Databricks and then it transforms the data to IDOC & post it to S4?

(or)

2. SAP PO directly polls the database tables using simple query statement? 

Which approach do you think is the best approach?

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: What is the best structure for organizing integration classes via PI/PO proxy?
entry.content:
I have a task to check the organization of PI classes in an environment.

The classes generated for proxy interfaces are organized as subclasses of the same class. So, when a new interface is created, instead of a new class being created for this interface, the same class destined for that namespace is used, and then only one new method is created, meaning that some objects can be reused.

This is generating several problems in the environment, because when two developers need to work at the same time on two different interfaces, a dependency occurs and one of them cannot proceed.

The choice to do the architecture this way was made a long time ago, and I imagine it will take a lot of work to undo it. However, I would like to know, in your opinion, what is the best way to organize these classes?

I usually make a class for each interface, but I'm open to ideas.

entry.title: Fetch data from multiple tables, then store it and compare it and send IDOCs to S4
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to fetch the data from multiple tables of database? and then store that data temporarily somewhere and then send only delta load data as Proxy messages to S4? or should we ask the sender database guys to build stored procedure kind of thing on database on their side and then SAP PO JDBC adapter calls that stored procedure to fetch the data from database? or Kindly let me know the best solution to solve this requirement.. thank you!

Below diagram is not perfect but the requirement is fetch data from multiple tables of Database and then pass it to S4?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: API-To retrieve ICOs from PO system
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm looking a way to retrieve all my ICOs from PI/PO system. what are the available ways to achieve it?

Best Regards,
Madhu

entry.title: Databricks DB issue SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on Interface to poll the Data from Databricks(Azure) DB and the connection work fine .. SAP PO JDBC sender adapter is able to fetch the data .. We also executed a simple Query SELECT TABLENAME and it also works fine.. But the issue is when executing a big Query statement...

When the Query statement is directly executed on Azure Databricks DB and it works fine..

Please see below screenshot where it shows the results when executed on Databricks DB..

But JDBC sender channel throws error issue when trying to execute a big Query statement.

Please see below screenshot where it shows the results when executed on Databricks DB.

 

Could you please suggest some inputs to resolve this issue?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: SAP PI/PO (If Message enter in SAP PI system how message will further Proceed)?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have a question. One of my interviewers asked me, "The message has entered in your SAP Pi system. What will you do?" like what will we further process.

I'm new to this field, so I don't understand the question. Could you please help me figure out what response he was expecting from me?

I told him that if the target side wants a message of this type, we will map it accordingly and move forward with the message. Was this the right answer?

Thanks,

Sanju.

entry.title: URL giving empty response from POSTMAN/CPI but working fine with Browser
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I am trying to use the URL from browser to get the details, it is working as expected(No Authentication Required). But, when trying to get the details from POSTMAN it is showing an empty response [].

Similar is the case with CPI HTTP adapter as well.

Please suggest, where I am going wrong. I tried other methods apart from GET but nothing working.

Thanks,

Nidhi

entry.title: ALERT-TO-MAIL Alert is not sent to SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have facing an issue related to ALERT-TO-MAIL and AlertConsumerJob emails in our quality system(AS ABAP System).The scenario works as follows: If an error occurs on the AS ABAP system, an alert should be triggered and the alert should also be in monitoring. The consumer job must then send emails. We use SAP PO 7.5. We have configured the alert consumer job and the alert mail consumer job is running. As of this week it is no longer possible to receive notifications in SAP PO. The AS ABAP system sends alert in SAP PO but the message does not arrive and email is not sent. However, if we clear a cache or make it full cache, we receive a notification in SAP PO and the email is also sent. Another thing with , is that log of an alert consumer job  indicates number 0 and completed.

 

JRA] handleRequest(), exception sent to client: ASJ.ejb.005043 (Failed in component: sap.com/com.sap.aii.af.service.alert.app, BC-NWA-XPI) Exception raised from invocation of public javax.resource.cci.MappedRecord com.sap.aii.alert.app.api.SXMS_ALERT_ERROR_RECEIVEBean.onMessage(javax.resource.cci.MappedRecord,javax.resource.cci.MappedRecord,java.util.Properties) method on bean instance com.sap.aii.alert.app.api.SXMS_ALERT_ERROR_RECEIVEBean@4a7a50db for bean sap.com/com.sap.aii.af.service.alert.app*xml|com.sap.aii.af.alert.ejb.jar*xml|SXMS_ALERT_ERROR_RECEIVEBean in application sap.com/com.sap.aii.af.service.alert.app.; nested exception is: java.lang.NullPointerException: while trying to invoke the method java.lang.String.concat(java.lang.String) of a null object returned from com.sap.aii.utilxi.sld.AbapClientSystem.getSystemName(), CONVID=34118738
Ganze Nachricht ausblenden

javax.ejb.EJBException: ASJ.ejb.005043 (Failed in component: sap.com/com.sap.aii.af.service.alert.app, BC-NWA-XPI) Exception raised from invocation of public javax.resource.cci.MappedRecord com.sap.aii.alert.app.api.SXMS_ALERT_ERROR_RECEIVEBean.onMessage(javax.resource.cci.MappedRecord,javax.resource.cci.MappedRecord,java.util.Properties) method on bean instance com.sap.aii.alert.app.api.SXMS_ALERT_ERROR_RECEIVEBean@4a7a50db for bean sap.com/com.sap.aii.af.service.alert.app*xml|com.sap.aii.af.alert.ejb.jar*xml|SXMS_ALERT_ERROR_RECEIVEBean in application sap.com/com.sap.aii.af.service.alert.app.; nested exception is: java.lang.NullPointerException: while trying to invoke the method java.lang.String.concat(java.lang.String) of a null object returned from com.sap.aii.utilxi.sld.AbapClientSystem.getSystemName()

 We also restarted the system and stopped the service but the error still persists. Do you have any idea how we could solve the problem? Here  are the logs of the error message.

Thank you very much and best regards.

entry.title: SAP PO FILE adapter additional file not keeping original file type in MAIL adapter as attachment
entry.content:
I have FILE to MAIL scenario. File sender is processing two file FileToMail.mail and FileToMail.csv. The first one serves as mail body and second one as attachment processed by additional files option in file adapter.

The issue is that FileToMail.csv is attaching as FileToMail.xml and i dont know why. I cant find the reason why is it changing its extension from .csv to .xml and tried many things to fix it without success.

Here is my file sender:

and here is my mail receiver:

I upload these two files into ftp

and result is always this. Mail body correctly processed but attachment with wrong extension:

entry.title: How to Edit/Trim filename in file receiver channel in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have an SFTP to File based scenario which is passthrough (No ESR mapping involved)

Here we are picking the statement files from SFTP server and placing in File NFS Al11 path we are getting filename as CAMT05X_11551XXX_309XXX_86530XXX_20241030003216391.xml20241030-013813-047.SNL10248D11730252152604557C

We are using ASMA parameter(SFTP Sender Channel) to maintain same file name from sender SFTP to File receiver channel.

Sender SFTP channel

Receiver File channel

We need to trim or remove the .SNL10248D11730252152604557C from the file name and place it in File NFS Al11 path.

Filename is changing dynamically so how can we achieve this??

Can someone please help here?

Thanks,

Vidya.
